description: High-level types for normalized bylaw requirements.

entries.label: Dimensional standard
entries.description: A measurable dimensional control such as lot area, frontage, yard, height, coverage, or density.

entries.label: Permitted use rule
entries.description: A rule that permits a use, use class, accessory use, secondary use, or conditional use.

entries.label: Prohibited use rule
entries.description: A rule that prohibits a use, use class, activity, structure, or condition.

entries.label: Design standard
entries.description: A built-form, site-design, facade, landscaping, architectural, or urban-design standard.

entries.label: Process requirement
entries.description: A procedural requirement for permits, applications, approvals, submissions, notices, or review.

entries.label: Agreement requirement
entries.description: A requirement for a development agreement, concept plan, site-specific exemption, or related legal agreement.

entries.label: Map applicability rule
entries.description: A rule whose applicability depends on a mapped feature, schedule, boundary, or spatial designation.

entries.label: Parking requirement
entries.description: A parking, loading, queuing, access, driveway, bicycle parking, or reserved parking requirement.

entries.label: Permitted use
entries.description: A requirement phrase or rule context for uses that are permitted.

entries.label: Parking space
entries.description: A requirement phrase or rule context for required or regulated parking spaces.

entries.label: Zoning map
entries.description: A requirement phrase or rule context for applicability tied to a zoning map.

entries.label: Driveway
entries.description: A requirement phrase or rule context for driveways or access.

entries.label: Development permit
entries.description: A requirement phrase or rule context for development permit processes.

entries.label: Schedule
entries.description: A requirement phrase or rule context for applicability tied to a schedule.

entries.label: Application shall
entries.description: A requirement phrase or rule context for procedural application requirements.

entries.label: Minimum lot frontage
entries.description: A requirement phrase or rule context for minimum lot frontage.

entries.label: Maximum building height
entries.description: A requirement phrase or rule context for maximum building height.

entries.label: Loading space
entries.description: A requirement phrase or rule context for loading spaces.

entries.label: Shall not be permitted
entries.description: A requirement phrase or rule context for prohibited uses or conditions.

entries.label: Minimum front yard
entries.description: A requirement phrase or rule context for minimum front yard requirements.

entries.label: Minimum lot area
entries.description: A requirement phrase or rule context for minimum lot area.

entries.label: Minimum side yard
entries.description: A requirement phrase or rule context for minimum side yard requirements.

entries.label: As shown on
entries.description: A requirement phrase or rule context for applicability shown on a plan, map, schedule, or other referenced source.

entries.label: Prohibited use
entries.description: A requirement phrase or rule context for prohibited uses.

entries.label: Minimum rear yard
entries.description: A requirement phrase or rule context for minimum rear yard requirements.

entries.label: Approval of council
entries.description: A requirement phrase or rule context for approval by council.

entries.label: Signage requirement
entries.description: A sign, sign structure, sign area, illumination, placement, or sign-permit requirement.

entries.label: Environmental requirement
entries.description: A storm surge, conservation, buffer, watercourse, landscaping, open-space, or environmental protection requirement.

entries.label: Relationship rule
entries.description: A rule that references, inherits from, modifies, exempts, or depends on another zone, section, clause, table, map, or definition.

entries.label: Other
entries.description: A requirement type that needs review or does not fit an existing category.
